🎮
THE PACIFIST SYSTEM
RLMC — RANK UP TRAINING
📖 Read the Index first
Browse concepts in order from Bronze to Grand Champion. Each entry teaches the system at the right time in your progression. Entries marked 📷 include in-game images.
🎯 Complete your Drills
Every rank has assigned drills. Tap the XP button to see full instructions and a video link. Mark it done once you've practised it properly — be honest with yourself.
🧠 Pass the Rank-Up Test
Once all drills for a rank are complete, the rank-up test unlocks. You must answer every question correctly to pass and advance. One wrong answer means a retry.
💬 Use the AI Coach
Stuck on a concept or drill? Open the Coach tab to ask AirCharged's system any question. Ask about specific drills, positions, or decisions.
🏆 BLUEPRINTS
AirCharged provides 5 complete training blueprints — Bronze→Gold, Gold→Platinum, Platinum→Diamond, Diamond→Champion, Champion→Grand Champion. Each is a 7-day plan with drill recommendations and video. Find them in the Index under Grand Champion once you have unlocked that tier.
ℹ️
HOW IT WORKS
THE PACIFIST SYSTEM — RLMC
Rank up through all 21 divisions from Bronze I to Grand Champion III — then unlock Supersonic Legend.
📖 Index — read concepts in rank order, with images and video links
🎯 Drills — complete all drills in a rank to unlock its test
🧠 Tests — all 3 questions must be correct to pass and advance
💬 AI Coach — ask anything about the Pacifist System
🏆 Blueprints — structured 7-day training plans in the Index (Grand Champion tier)
